## Validation

- [ ] `pnpm run test`
- [ ] Contract changes: `pnpm run test:contracts` passed
- [ ] Script surface changes: `pnpm run verify:scripts && pnpm run test:scripts` passed
- [ ] Manual verification notes added when UI behavior changes
- [ ] AgentRun debugging browser changes: run `make test-agent-run-debugging-e2e` manually only when browser behavior or screenshots need acceptance coverage

## Release impact

- [ ] No user-facing change
- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] Migration or configuration change documented
